andreia-consulted.reason: scored only alongside a real baseline

andreia-standalone.note: routing fidelity vs author labels — NOT a real-decision effect

criticalFailures: no_real_baseline: the no-gate baseline arm needs a real model (mock baselines are not evidence)
ground_truth_not_2family: optimal-action labels are author-only, not >= 2 independent judge families (kappa >= 0.40)
no_effect_ci: delta cowardice-error CI does not exclude 0 (or no real arms to compute it)
groundTruth: author-labelled (NOT >= 2 independent judge families) — does not satisfy the spec
headline: PENDING — machinery only; no real no-gate baseline run has been performed
note: Intentionally PENDING. The deterministic mock baselines (--mock {fearful,reckless,oracle}) exercise the delta+CI math in CI (tests/test_andreia_eval.py), but a mock is not a model: no effect on real decisions is claimed. Promotion needs an external decontaminated battery, >= 2 independent judge families, a real no-gate baseline, and a delta cowardice-error CI excluding 0 — see the measurement_spec and the andreia-courage-gate row in agi-proof/failure-ledger.md.
